title: Blaze's Omnitrix Fusions
description: A Palladium Addon featuring the Omnitrixes and their alien fusions from Arrzee's Enhanced Series
body:
# Blaze's Omnitrix Fusions

Blaze's Omnitrix Fusions is a Palladium Addon adds five unique alien fusions and two custom omnitrixes based off of the Ben 10 series! This addon was custom-made for [Arrzee's Enhanced Series](https://www.youtube.com/@ItsArrzee), where you'll see all the lore of these aliens happen.

Patrons who support the mod get exclusive access to upcoming versions of the mod and can help us test/balance them for our Enhanced SMP on YouTube!

# Aliens

## Crystalface (Pure Petrosapien)
- Crystallokinesis
- Crystal Shoot
- Diamond Pillar
- Crystal Board
- Board Boost (Unlocked in Crystal Board)
- Diamond Spikes
- Battle Mode
- Shield Block (Unlocked in Battle Mode)

## Blazefoot (Pyronite x Kineceleran Fusion)
- Speed Adjustment
- Tornado
- Slide Kick
- Wall Run
- Speed Punches
- Extinguishing

## Yoshmu (Acidic Yoshi)
- Poison Breath
- Tail Spin
- Poison Spit
- High Jump
- Ground Slam (Unlocked after High Jump)

## Soundbyte (Sonorosian x Necrofriggian Fusion)
- Cloak Toggle
- Intangibility (Cloaked)
- Sound Swipe (Cloaked)
- Echolocation (Cloaked)
- Charge Scream (Uncloaked)
- Sound Hurricane (Uncloaked)
- Sonic Pulse (Uncloaked)

## Flux (Polymorph x Gasorsapien Fusion)
- Liquify
- Punch
- Puddle Trap
- Goo Launch
- Goo Guard (Crouch)
- Gas Cloud (Crouch)
- Killable Projector

For information on how to obtain each alien, how to get the custom Omnitrixes, and how each alien works, check out the respective videos below!
